stages.name: Quote created, not sent
stages.description: Installer has prepared or is preparing quote, but the post-quote follow-up flow has not started.

stages.name: Quote sent, strategy needed
stages.description: Customer has received a quote and no closing strategy exists yet.

stages.name: Active follow-up
stages.description: The assistant has a current hypothesis about blocker and next best action.

stages.name: Task scheduled
stages.description: A call, visit, or other action is scheduled but not completed.

stages.name: Post-action debrief needed
stages.description: An action happened or was skipped and needs a debrief before strategy is updated.

stages.name: Strategy update needed
stages.description: New information from a debrief, customer reply, or missing-data upload should update buyer signals, objections, and task recommendation.

stages.name: Contract ready
stages.description: Major blockers appear resolved and the customer needs final recap, signature path, or scheduling confirmation.

stages.name: Paused
stages.description: Further outreach would add little value or the customer requested review time. Resume only on defined condition.

stages.name: Lost
stages.description: Customer declined, chose another provider, opted out, or is no longer qualified.

events.description: Quote has been sent to customer.
Assistant generated buyer signal and objection hypothesis.
A call, visit, or meeting has been scheduled.
An email, WhatsApp video, gift, or other async task has been sent.
A call, meeting, or other scheduled action happened.
Installer logged outcome, customer language, blockers, new facts, and next commitment.
Customer asked for someone to inspect or look at the house.
Customer mentioned another provider, referral, quote, or price comparison.
Customer or installer uploaded bill, photos, tariff, competitor quote, heat-load data, or similar proof input.
Customer asked for contract/signature step or signable document.
